today_news.title: ChatGPT will give you worse health advice if you don't pay
today_news.summary: OpenAI is rolling out "Health in ChatGPT" to U.S. users, connecting Apple Health, medical records, and wellness apps. today_news.title: One tampered ChatGPT link could spawn a rogue AI agent that took orders from an attacker every five minutes
today_news.summary: Zenity Labs uncovered "AgentForger," a vulnerability in OpenAI's Agent Builder that let a single manipulated ChatGPT link create an autonomous agent on an employee's behalf. today_news.title: Flux 3 generates videos with native audio up to 20 seconds long, a first for Black Forest Labs
today_news.summary: Black Forest Labs has released Flux 3, a multimodal foundation model that learns from images, video, and audio and can generate video with native sound for the first time. today_news.title: Google CEO Pichai says Gemini's next leap depends on building "much larger base models"

today_news.title: Poolside's Laguna S 2.1 is a small open-weight coding model that punches well above its size
today_news.summary: Poolside has released Laguna S 2.1, its third coding model in three months. Rather than rely on raw scale, the company trained it to keep checking its work, revise failed approaches, and avoid giving up too soon during long agentic sessions. today_news.title: Supercooled kidneys have been transplanted into pigs in a “landmark achievement”
today_news.summary: When it comes to organ donation, time is everything. As soon as an organ has been carefully removed from a donor’s body, it starts to deteriorate. today_tech.title: JAXBench: Benchmarking Autonomous TPU Kernel Optimization
today_tech.summary: Abstract: Rigorous benchmarks have driven progress in autonomous GPU kernel performance optimization by establishing a shared target to hillclimb on, but no equivalent exists for TPUs. today_tech.title: ConfidenceBench: Evaluating Confidence Calibration in Large Language Models

today_tech.summary: Abstract: Protecting speech privacy in real-life audio recordings is a growing concern.
